  • Uses of Workspace in auxiliaries

    Methods in auxiliaries that return Workspace
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static Workspace
    JsonFileStorage.loadWorkspaceData()
    Loads the workspace data either from an external file if present, or from the bundled resource otherwise.
    Methods in auxiliaries with parameters of type Workspace
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    JsonFileStorage.saveWorkspaceData(Workspace workspace)
    Serializes the given Workspace into a JSON representation and writes it to the specified file path.

    Methods in controller that return Workspace
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Workspace
    AppController.getWorkspace()
    Returns the Workspace data observed by the Workspace Page.

    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    AppController(Workspace data)
    Constructs a new AppController to control the provided workspace.

    Class
    Description
    class 
    WorkspacePage
    Defines a page view that displays a Workspace and its associated list of Checklists.
